nasb.text: and they said to Moses, “Your servants have taken a census of men of war who are in our charge, and no man of us is missing.

esv.text: and said to Moses, “Your servants have counted the men of war who are under our command, and there is not a man missing from us.

cnv.text: 對摩西說：“你僕人手下作戰的士兵，已經計算總數，沒有缺少一人。

ccb.text: 说：“仆人们统计了手下出征的战士，未失一兵一卒。
